NAVAREA XIX 71/13
1. BARENTS SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS BY M/V OCEANIC CHALLENGER IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A. 74-16.0N 027-10.0E
B. 72-15.0N 027-10.0E
C. 70-00.0N 017-00.0E
D. 73-35.0N 014-17.0E
E. 74-20.0N 020-30.0E
VESSEL TOWING 12 X 6000 METRES LONG CABLES, MARKED WITH YELLOW  TAIL BUOYS AND FLASHING LIGHT AT THE END OF THE CABELS.
GUARD VESSELS CASSANDRA 5 AND 4-WINDS IN ATTENDANCE. 
FIVE MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 24/13
